event: View of the Rialto Bridge on the Grand Canal in Venice
symbols: the Rialto Bridge — Venice's iconic stone arch spanning the Grand Canal, a monument of Renaissance engineering and commerce
gondolas moored at the canal's edge — the traditional Venetian vessels, symbols of the city's maritime identity
the Grand Canal — the main waterway of Venice, the city built upon the waters
description: The Rialto Bridge dominates the composition, its broad stone arch with arched openings spanning the Grand Canal from left to center. Venetian buildings in ochre, cream, and gray crowd the far bank. Several gondolas and small boats are moored in the blue-green water at the base of the bridge. Wooden mooring poles rise from the water in the foreground. The painting is rendered in a loose, plein-air impressionistic style with visible brushwork, capturing the light and atmosphere of Venice in muted, overcast tones.
